chapter_title.en: The Method of Ghusl for Janabah (ritual Bath for Sexual impurity)

text: 190 - وَ عَنِ اَلْمَرْأَةِ تَرَى فِي اَلْمَنَامِ مَا يَرَى اَلرَّجُلُ قَالَ «إِنْ أَنْزَلَتْ فَعَلَيْهَا اَلْغُسْلُ وَ إِنْ لَمْ تُنْزِلْ فَلَيْسَ عَلَيْهَا غُسْلٌ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.190 - (Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) ) was asked regarding a woman who sees in her dream what a man sees (i.e., a sexual dream).
Imam (as) said: 'If She has a discharge, ghusl (ritual bathing) is obligatory for her; but if She does not have a discharge, then ghusl is not required.'"
